result: Validation complete. The knowledge file is mostly accurate with only minor punctuation inconsistencies. All substantive information from the source is present and correctly represented in the knowledge file.

findings.description: Multiple attribute descriptions in the table are missing terminal periods (。) that are present in the source file. Affected rows: tag-generic_attributes_tag (id属性は指定不可), tag-focus_attributes_tag (accesskey属性は指定不可), name (XHTMLのname属性), elementLabelProperty (リスト要素からラベルを取得するためのプロパティ名), elementValueProperty (リスト要素から値を取得するためのプロパティ名), disabled (XHTMLのdisabled属性...), onchange (XHTMLのonchange属性), errorCss (nablarch_error), and nameAlias (カンマ区切り).
findings.source_evidence: Source RST table shows each cell ending with period (。) or sentences ending with periods, but knowledge file table omits these terminal punctuation marks in multiple rows
